THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONELL, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 715 LEAVENWORTH ST, #12, S.F, CA. $1,595.00 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00, LEASE FORFEITED
